message:
fix(gateway): context rotation, tokenizer, and metrics bug fixes

## Context Rotation (context-rotation.ts)
- Update sendMessage handler signature to include message type parameter
  (agentId, type: "user"|"system", message) for proper message routing
- Update all internal sendMessage calls to use "system" type for
  rotation prompts and handoff requests

## Tokenizer Service (tokenizer.service.ts)
- truncateToTokens(): Handle maxTokens <= 0 edge case (return empty)
- truncateToTokens(): Handle case where ellipsis alone exceeds maxTokens
- splitIntoChunks(): Handle maxTokensPerChunk <= 0 edge case
- splitIntoChunks(): Account for separator tokens (\n\n, space) in
  chunk size calculations to prevent off-by-one overflows
- splitIntoChunks(): Truncate oversized sentences instead of looping

## Metrics (metrics.ts)
- Fix calculatePercentile() for cumulative histogram buckets
- Previous implementation incorrectly accumulated counts again
- Buckets are already cumulative (count = values <= bucket.le)
- Now correctly finds first bucket where count >= target

Includes comprehensive test suite for context rotation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
